allow: Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\)\); console.log\('title:', d.title, 'author:', d.author, 'views:', d.views\)" echo "" echo "=== POST create ===" curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/posts -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"title":"테스트 글","content":"테스트 내용","author":"테스터","password":"1234"}' echo "" echo "=== PUT wrong password ===" curl -s -X PUT http://localhost:3000/api/posts/1 -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"title":"수정","content":"수정내용","password":"wrong"}' echo "" echo "=== DELETE ===" curl -s -o /dev/null -w "status: %{http_code}" -X DELETE http://localhost:3000/api/posts/19 -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"password":"1234"}' echo "" kill %1)

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\)\); console.log\('count:', d.totalCount, 'title:', d.posts[0]?.title\)" echo "" echo "=== PUT wrong pw ===" curl -s -X PUT http://localhost:3000/api/posts/1 -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"title":"x","content":"x","password":"wrong"}' echo "" kill %1)
